violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Cooked potatoes found not date marked in the walk-in cooler. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked so they are disposed in a timely manner. Expired half gallons of milk were found in the reach-in cooler. Expired food items should be discarded.
